description:
Create a multi-course dinner menu document in Microsoft Word 2010 for the 'Annual Corporate Gala Dinner'. The document must include a centered title block: 'Annual Corporate Gala Dinner' (Bold, 20pt), 'Grand Ballroom — The Heritage Hotel' (Italic, 12pt), and 'Saturday, March 15, 2025' (Regular, 11pt). Organize the menu into 'Appetizers', 'Entrées', and 'Desserts' sections using bold 13pt headings. Use a right-aligned tab stop with dot leaders at the 6-inch mark to align the prices for all items.

Menu Content:
Appetizers: Seared Diver Scallops with Citrus Beurre Blanc ($18), Wild Mushroom Bisque with Truffle Cream ($14), Heirloom Tomato Tartare with Burrata ($16).
Entrées: Pan-Roasted Filet Mignon with Bordelaise Sauce ($45), Herb-Crusted Atlantic Salmon with Dill Velouté ($38), Roasted Free-Range Chicken with Jus Lié ($34), Wild Mushroom Risotto with Parmigiano Reggiano ($28).
Desserts: Valrhona Chocolate Fondant with Crème Anglaise ($15), Tarte Tatin with Calvados Ice Cream ($14), Selection of Artisanal Cheeses ($18).

Include a centered, italicized footer: 'All prices are per person. Tax and gratuity not included.' Save the document as 'GalaDinnerMenu.docx' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
